content: Hi, I'd like to cancel my ProjectFlow subscription.

I’m sorry to hear you’d like to cancel — is there anything specific that led to this? I can apply a 20% discount to your subscription for the next 3 months; would you like me to apply that, or would you prefer to proceed with cancellation? If yes to the discount or cancellation, please confirm the email on your ProjectFlow account so I can take care of it.

We've grown and I need something that works for a whole team — shared boards, user management, that kind of thing. Thanks, but that's not the issue; please proceed with cancellation. My account email is casey@brightloop.com.

I’m sorry to hear you’re leaving — thank you for letting us know. I understand you need team features like shared boards and user management; I can offer a 20% discount for the next 3 months if you’d consider staying, or I can pause your account for up to 2 months instead. Since you asked to proceed, I’ve canceled your subscription for account casey@brightloop.com effective 2026-02-28; your data will be retained for 90 days if you change your mind.

arguments.reason: Customer requested cancellation — needs team features (shared boards, user management).

cancellation.note: You can reactivate your account within 90 days to restore all data.
